channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Loyal Detroit Lions fans struggle with steep increase in season ticket prices
item.description: Undoubtedly, Detroit Lions fans are excited about this year, but those jaw-dropping season ticket prices for 2025?
item.dc:creator: Shawnte Passmore, Local 4

item.title: Mariah Carey set to kick off NFL Christmas Gameday with pre-taped performance
item.description: Following the abrupt cancellation of Mariah Carey's sold-out Pittsburgh concert, Netflix has announced that the pop diva will kick off its Christmas Day football broadcast.
item.dc:creator: Karu F Daniels, The Mercury News

item.title: Poway 16-year-old starts nonprofit to deliver basketballs for the holidays
item.description: William Ralston's bedroom might look like an ordinary teenage boy's roo, but it is his very own Santa Claus-style workshop.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Caitlin Clark White privilege comment sparks intense, personal argument between Riley Gaines and Jemele Hill
item.description: Riley Gaines' latest online spat with a left-leaning figure came against journalist Jemele Hill regarding Caitlin Clark's recent 'White privilege' comments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luke Littler was an unknown a year ago. Now he's making millions and taking darts into mainstream
item.description: Luke Littler was virtually unknown a year ago. Now he is making millions, transcending his sport and is searched for more often on Google than King Charles and the British Prime Minister.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rams outlast 49ers with zero touchdowns scored in pivotal NFC West matchup
item.description: No one expected two of the best offenses in the league recently to put up no touchdowns in this game, but the Rams were able to outlast the 49ers doing so in this pivotal division game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers LB De'Vondre Campbell refuses to enter game after losing his starting spot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter Thursday night's game in the third quarter after losing his starting job when Dre Greenlaw returned from an injury.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jones, Jefferson help No. 3 Iowa State rally past Iowa, 89-80
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — Curtis Jones scored 23 points, Joshua Jefferson added 19 points and 10 rebounds and No. 3 Iowa State overcame a 13-point deficit to beat Iowa 89-80 on Thursday night. Iowa State (8-1) snapped a four-game road losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hidalgo scores 29 as No. 8 Notre Dame holds off No. 2 UConn 79-68
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — Hannah Hidalgo had 29 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists, and No. 8 Notre Dame handed second-ranked UConn its first loss with a 79-68 victory Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials put coach on leave after AP reports sexual abuse allegations
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee has placed an employee on administrative leave after The Associated Press reported that one of its coaches was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete, causing her so much distress that she attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: Martha Bellisle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Raiders player Charles Snowden facing misdemeanor DUI charge after Las Vegas arrest
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Las Vegas officers found Raiders football player Charles Snowden “passed out” behind the wheel of a Jeep Cherokee, its engine running as it balanced atop a retaining wall, before his arrest on a misdemeanor charge of driving under the influence of alcohol, according to a police repo
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hojlund scores twice for Man United to beat Viktoria Plzen 2-1 in Europa League, Tottenham held 1-1
item.description: Rasmus Hojlund scored twice after coming off the bench and Manchester United rallied to beat Viktoria Plzen 2-1 in the Europa League on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: KAREL JANICEK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State athletic director 'absolutely' confident Ryan Day will return next season
item.description: The calls for Ryan Day to be fired in Columbus are louder than ever, but Ohio State athletic director Ross Bjork isn't exactly listening to them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American Jack Alexy wins first individual gold medal in men’s 100m free final at world swimming championships
item.description: Olympic gold medalist Jack Alexy took home his second gold medal and first individual gold at the short course World Championships on Thursday after winning the men's 100-meter freestyle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Expanded College Football Playoff field draws more bets and on more teams
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — If Texas coach Steve Sarkisian holds aloft the College Football Playoff trophy next month, that will be bad news for BetMGM Sportsbook.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders owner Mark Davis offers telling response to speculation about Antonio Pierce’s future
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders owner Mark Davis said he would not make any midseason decisions after being asked Wednesday about Antonio Pierce's future with the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 1 school board gives necessary approval on Arlington Park property tax deal with Bears; 2 more to go
item.description: PALATINE, Ill. — The Bears have moved one step closer to a property tax agreement on the 326-acre site of the former Arlington International Racecourse in northwest suburban Arlington Heights.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Wander Franco trial postponed due to no-show witnesses
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco is scheduled to go to trial Thursday in the Dominican Republic in a sexual abuse case involving a 14-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: MARTÍN ADAMES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Bishop's 60, Olympian 34
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops on Tuesday night with Olympian playing at Bishop's. The Knights were lead by Moana Peterson, junior guard poured in 15 and added a few steals. Also chipped with quite a few assists as well. Final score in this one Bishop's won 60-34.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Joe Burrow's home reportedly broken in to Monday night during game
item.description: According to WLWT, Joe Burrow's Anderson Township, Ohio home was broken into and confirmed by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Top-rated recruit AJ Dybantsa chooses BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The definitive #1 rated basketball recruit in the entire country is coming to BYU. AJ Dybantsa, a 6-foot-9 forward, announced on ESPN Tuesday that he is committing to play basketball for the Cougars starting in the 2025-26 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Reports: White Sox sign former Cub Mike Tauchman
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Free agent outfielder Mike Tauchman is trading the North Side for the South Side, according to multiple reports. MLB.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kings make 22 three-pointers, blow out Jazz, 141-97
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - On Friday, the Utah Jazz put up 141 points in a blowout win over Portland. On Sunday, they were on the receiving end of a 141-point outburst. Kevin Huerter had 26 points, including six 3-pointers, and the Sacramento Kings beat the Utah Jazz 141-97 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press, a deal that could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kalani Sitake signs long-term contract extension
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 10-2 season, BYU has signed head coach Kalani Sitake to a long-term contract extension that will keep him in Provo well into the future.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
